ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Name of the home ground */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Current market value of the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owner */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current manager */,
  "current_season" TEXT /* Current season of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a manager */,
  "past_teams" TEXT /* Teams managed in the past */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Date the manager's contract started */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* Date the manager's contract ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the record */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points earned per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  "wage" REAL /* Current wage of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "joined_team" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "left_team" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the performance */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "goals_per_game" REAL /* Average goals scored per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee in millions of currency */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (sale, purchase, loan) */,
  "loan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (league, cup, friendly) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., goal, substitution, yellow card) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event (e.g., 45+2' for 45 minutes and 2 seconds) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., team, player, match) */,
  "resource_category" TEXT /* Category of the resource (e.g., team, player, match) */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., performance, financial) */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report type */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the roster */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "roster_status" TEXT /* Status of the player in the roster (active, injured, transferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
